transcript.text:
[Just what is she ordering?]
[Stop!]
[9 Stacks High]
[Steamed dumplings]
[Dumplings Party]
[Juicy explosions]
[Slurp the juice]
[Bang!]
So juicy
I can't decide
Hello everyone
I'm here at Songpa-gu, Bangi-dong to eat some dumplings
I really like the juicy Xiaolongbao dumplings
Here!
[Seodusan Dimsum (Seoul, Songpa-gu)]
Hello~

What's good here?
Fried dumplings, Xiaolongbaos are a must
[And much more]
Then...
Yaki dumplings, shrimp dumplings, Xiaolongbao, shrimp dim sum, pouch dim sum,
[Let's see...]
Go ahead
[Let's try that again]
[And...]
[Stop...]
2 more orders of Xiaolongbao, please
Do you really eat all of that?
Yes, always
[Customers]
Is it good here?
It's really good

We come every 2 days
[I'll show you]
Thank you Wow, interesting
Bon appetit
Looks really good
It's been a while since I had dim sum
I'll eat the Xiaolongbao first
It's going to be great
The juice comes out if you pop it
It's spilling
Look at that broth
That's so soft
The juiciness fills your mouth
Pop it
Look at that
That's amazing

It's really been a while
The juice is really savory
I've been wanting to try this
Which one's which?
Yaki dumplings
Shrimp dumplings
It looks like a pancake
Cool, right?
That's crispy
It's like chips
No soy sauce needed here
Fried dumplings are also very juicy
Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside
1 by 1
What next?
Dim sum

Shrimp dim sum It's filled with shrimp
What's this?
It's a mix
Meat and shrimp
Let's try the rest
What's this?
Ruby dim sum
Ruby dim sum?
You can see the red fillings
The wrap is not just flour
It's a really chewy, soft wrap
This is emerald dim sum
I wonder what's inside
Let's cut it up
Looks like chives
Everything is tasty

This is shrimp
Look at the shrimp
I'm so happy
Yaki
This is almost all meat
Pouch dim sum
I've always wondered what the insides looked like
So this is how it looks
That's cool
It's like kimchi dumplings That's delicious
Meat and kimchi
Lots of meat
This time...
I got to try everything I'll just eat now
I was held back because I had to introduce everything
It just explodes

There's more on the bottom
I'll eat that later
Shrimp fried dumplings
These are my favorite
It's really tasty
It's just what I like
The softness from the steamed dumplings
And the crispiness of the fried dumplings together
How's it so juicy
How~!
The dim sum and har gow fillings are pretty chunky
Pouch dim sum in soy sauce
Yummy
This is the emerald
The shrimp is really big
It can take me 2~3 days to eat that

Well, I don't think I can
Wrap it like this
I was worried that I would taste ginseng from these dim sum,
But I can't taste it at all
I'm hesitant to eat them because they're all so pretty
If you look at this, it looks like crispy rice
Yum
These feel lighter because the taste of the flour is not overwhelming
Dumplings are one of the foods that can make you feel heavy/bloated
These don't feel like that Maybe because they're so juicy?
It's so good
This really tastes like kimchi dumplings
Most of these have shrimp inside
I don't go crazy for dumplings, but
these juicy dumplings are so delicious
Let's make it 2 of each left

It's spilling
There are really tasty frozen dumplings lately
But they can't compare to these dine-in dumpling spots yet
2 of each, right?
It's really delicious
She gives you an extra basket on the bottom because of the juice
I was wondering what that was for
Cut in half
Explosion
[Have to drink from the plate]
The bottom is wavy
What?
I can't decide
These are all good
Why can't there be something like this near my house?
What's even near your house?

There's nothing near my house
Let's see...
Baskin Robbins...
The food got cold, but they're still good
[You're good at eating...]
Not feeling greased up?
No, it's all great
So juicy
So good at eating, but skinny
That juiciness
Only 1 of each left
How did that end up happening?
I like leaving the best for last
I really can't decide which is better than which
Everything is tasty so I left 1 of each
What now?

Let's just eat them in order
Yum
Har gow is so good too
Can you digest it all?
9 servings!
[Co-owner shows up]
2 of you?
Alone? Just by yourself?
[No way...]
How're you not fat?
[A common question]
I want more
What do you want? I'll make it for you
Our fried rice is good too
That sounds good
Should I eat it?

She's so cool
Thank you~
Looks yummy
I can smell the smokiness It's almost like nasi goreng
That's delicious!
Good thing I ordered this
It's pretty greasy
But it doesn't feel heavy
With some saltiness
And a clean taste
The rice itself is really good
They're all stuck together But not too much
It's that stage before it becomes crispy rice
There's not much to it, but it's so good
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
